Branding and promotional campaign for a vegan ice cream brand — covering advertising visuals and packaging design across three flavours. Clean, purposeful, and proudly indulgent.

Branding · Advertising · Visual Design

Natural Skincare — Earth Essence

A series of advertising posters for Earth Essence — a natural skincare brand rooted in botanical ingredients. The creative direction translates ingredient purity into striking, campaign-ready visuals.

2024 — Concept Project →
Branding · Advertising · Visual Design

UX / UI Design 4 projects
UX / UI · Landing Page

Yahoo Landing Page Redesign

A UX-driven redesign of Yahoo's cluttered homepage — rethinking information architecture, visual hierarchy, and layout to reduce cognitive load and improve content discoverability.

2024 — Concept Project →
UX / UI · Design System

Design System for Zoo Magazine

A comprehensive design system for Zoo Magazine's digital platform — colour palette, typography scale, component library, spacing logic, and navigation patterns. Praised by the editor-in-chief.

2023 — Zoo Magazine Amsterdam →

An AR eCommerce mobile app for indoor plant parents — designed end-to-end from user research through information architecture, UX design, brand identity, and logo development.

UI Design · Mobile App · Onboarding

Green Guardian — UI Onboarding

2024 — Concept Project →

Web Design · WordPress

Obeetee US — Landing Page Build
